benefits.title: Why ViralClicker?
benefits.subtitle: The tools you need to sell more via WhatsApp
benefits.benefit1Desc: Each quote has a unique link that the client can view, modify, and approve. No static PDFs.
benefits.benefit2Desc: Create discount codes and apply them directly to active quotes. Perfect for closing deals.
benefits.benefit3Desc: Send promotions and follow-ups to your lead base directly from the CRM.
benefits.benefit4Desc: Monitor each client's status after the sale: installation, payment, satisfaction.
benefits.benefit5Desc: Automated follow-ups keep your leads warm until they convert.
benefits.benefit6Desc: Your system ready and running in one week. No endless waits or never-ending projects.

demo.title: See what's inside ViralClicker
demo.subtitle: A system designed so you sell and the system handles follow-up
demo.card1Desc: Your client gets a unique link with real-time pricing. They can accept, comment, or request changes—all tracked.
demo.card2Desc: See every opportunity by stage: New, Quoted, Negotiating, Closed. Never lose track of follow-ups.
demo.card3Desc: Clear reports: quotes sent, close rate, avg. response time, average ticket value.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Get answers before you get started
faq.instructionMobile: Tap a question to see the answer
faq.q1: Do I need WhatsApp Business API or can I use regular WhatsApp?
faq.a1: You need WhatsApp Business API (via Twilio). It's the only way to send automated messages, use approved templates, and track delivery metrics. Regular WhatsApp doesn't support automation or campaigns.
faq.q2: What costs do I pay vs. what's included in my plan?
faq.a2: Your plan includes: hosting, maintenance, support, and minor updates. You pay Twilio directly for messaging costs (approx. $0.03–0.05 USD per message in the USA). This gives you full control over your WhatsApp spend.
faq.q3: How fast is setup? What do I need to provide?
faq.a3: Setup takes 7 business days. We just need: your logo, brand colors, product/service list with prices, and access to your WhatsApp number. We handle everything else.
faq.q4: Can I use my own domain?
faq.a4: Yes. We connect your existing domain (e.g., quotes.yourbusiness.com) at no extra configuration cost. You only pay for the domain if you don't already have one.
faq.q5: Can I start simple and add automation later?
faq.a5: Absolutely. Start with Starter and upgrade to Pro or Elite anytime. Your data stays intact and the migration is instant.
faq.q6: What if I already have a website or CRM?
faq.a6: ViralClicker works alongside your existing tools. We can embed the quote form on your current site, or you can use our landing page as a standalone quote funnel.
faq.q7: Where is my data stored? Can I export it?
faq.a7: Your data is stored securely in the cloud with enterprise-grade encryption. You can export all your leads, clients, and quotes as CSV anytime—your data is always yours.
faq.q8: What's included in setup vs. what counts as 'minor changes'?
faq.a8: Setup includes: landing page design, quote builder configuration, CRM setup, WhatsApp API integration, and 1-on-1 onboarding. Minor changes are small tweaks like editing text, updating form fields, or modifying WhatsApp templates—not new features or redesigns.
faq.a9: Yes, no penalty. Your plan renews monthly and you can cancel anytime. We provide a full backup of your data (leads, clients, quotes).
faq.a10: We respond via WhatsApp and email during business hours (Monday–Friday, 9 AM–6 PM EST). Response time: under 4 hours on business days. Elite plans get priority support with under 2-hour response.
faq.ctaSubtitle: Chat with us or book a demo to get all your questions answered

home.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about ViralClicker.
home.faq1A: No. ViralClicker is designed for business owners. Our team handles the full setup and configuration so you can focus on selling.
home.faq2A: Most businesses are fully set up within 5-7 business days. We configure everything during a guided onboarding session.
home.faq3Q: Does it work with WhatsApp Business?
home.faq3A: Yes. ViralClicker integrates with WhatsApp Business API through Twilio, enabling automated messages and follow-ups.
home.faq4Q: Can I customize the quote system?
home.faq4A: Absolutely. You can configure services, pricing models, extras, variables, and discount rules to match your business.
home.faq5A: Yes. All subscription payments are securely processed through Stripe. You can manage your billing from your account.
home.faq6Q: Can my team use the CRM?
home.faq6A: Yes. Depending on your plan, you can add team members with different roles and permissions to manage your pipeline.
